subcategory.title: Mountain tour
subcategory.description: Discover and book your next mountain adventure here. Switzerland's mountain hiking trails in the difficulty levels T2 and T3 are marked in white-red-white, while the alpine mountain hiking trails (T4) are marked in white-blue-white. On a guided mountain tour you can explore unknown terrain that would be too dangerous on your own. Mountain tours are offered in Switzerland wherever you encounter high alpine mountains.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: challenging glacier tour: hikers on a glacier in the Alps with impressive mountain landscape in summer
Breithorn: majestic mountain with a snow-capped peak in Zermatt. Ideal for winter adventures.
Glacier tour: Experience a challenging hike in the impressive Alps with breathtaking views.
Glacier Tour: Group activity with experienced guides on a snow-covered glacier in stunning mountain landscape.
